transform.description: Transform kind: "direct", "cast", "expression", etc. Stringified from `rocky_sql::lineage::TransformKind` to avoid pulling schemars into rocky-sql.

direction.description: Direction of the trace walk: `"upstream"` (producers) or `"downstream"` (consumers). Defaults to upstream when `--column` is set without direction flags, matching pre-Arc-1 behaviour.

downstream_consumers.description: Every downstream column that transitively consumes `(model, column)`, deduplicated and deterministically sorted. An author-time "what does changing this column affect" signal, always populated regardless of `direction` so the default (upstream) trace still carries the blast radius. Inspection only — this never feeds a build/skip/reuse decision. Empty when the column has no consumers.
